name: Thick & Rich Red Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 large Green bell pepper, seeded and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beans, water, green bell pepper, and salt. Bring to a boil and simmer for 1½ to 2 hours. Add more water as needed.
2. Prepare SOFRITO: Heat olive oil in a skillet. Sauté garlic, onion, and green bell pepper until tender. Add tomatoes, vinegar, sherry, oregano, cumin, salt, and pepper. Cook for 10 minutes.
3. When beans are tender, add the sofrito, potatoes, and squash. Stir to blend and cook over low heat until potatoes and squash are tender. Serve as is or puree. Drizzle some olive oil over each serving.
